name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident ec5520e5-b257-4c44-96cc-6abc3b7b354e
description:
Here's an analysis of the alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A user on a network segment (192.168.1.31) attempted to access a privileged file – potentially containing sensitive data – via a command execution.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the compromised host to prevent further data exfiltration and potential damage.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
